name: m1_failts_only
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): deferred-entry semantics: a single alpha-FAIL write ({tag:z, ts:7}) evaluates against the epoch-final bean (tag=z) -> constraint fail -> fold-absent no-op. No fire.
